cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: 'Runs' at 1FPS. Tried all kind of (proton/wine) tricks. Still not working. Proton log points to DotNET. Installing 4.0, VC2010, etc = still no go. Game's own minidumps tell me nothing with GNU debugger. Also not working with 'pure' WINE (lastest staging build) outside Steam/Proton.
title: GTR 2 FIA GT Racing Game

title: GTR 2 FIA GT Racing Game

notes: Using 'PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%' as start parameter the game runs perfectly except there is no force feedback on my g920. I just played a singleplayer game with standard install and without patching the missing cars back in.
